rationale: Four repeated codebase precedents (record_sub_loop_crash ENH-2005, record_crash, record_node_crash, record_gate_error) all split infra/crash outcomes into a dedicated new state distinct from the logic-failure sibling; no precedent exists for Option B's single-state-interpolated-reason shape. Scored 10/12 vs 7/12.
alternatives_rejected: Option B: interpolate a reason string into the existing skip_inflight state instead of adding a new state
